summary: A UI-oriented container that displays child panels and supports layout, background colors, and interactive panel features. Used for building control panels and interfaces.

key_params.name: alignorder
key_params.note: How child panels are arranged: Left to Right, Top to Bottom, etc.

key_params.name: hmode
key_params.note: Horizontal sizing mode: Fixed, Fill, etc.

key_params.name: vmode
key_params.note: Vertical sizing mode: Fixed, Fill, etc.

common_gotchas: Container COMPs render as panels — use Base COMPs instead if you do not need panel/UI features.
Panel sizing modes (Fill vs Fixed) interact with parent containers and can produce unexpected layouts.
